title: Delgar
subtitle: E-Commerce Platform
summary: High-performance online catalog and inventory dashboard designed for bulk wholesale items.
overview: Delgar is an enterprise portal designed to showcase a large matrix of products with various size, style, and packaging combinations.
problem: Customers struggled with complex Excel spreadsheets and manual order sheets, creating communication gaps and stock delays.
role: Frontend Nuxt Engineer, integrating high-speed client searches and bulk pricing filters.
solution: Built a Client-side optimized interface with advanced state caching to prevent repeated catalog payloads.
features: Grid matrix entry allowing quick ordering of multiple variants at once
On-the-fly PDF invoice generation utilizing custom layouts
Dynamic volume-based tier discount pricing module

technicalDecisions.reason: Pre-renders the entire catalog into static pages, loading in milliseconds for speed-focused wholesale buyers.

challenges: Managing thousands of complex variant combinations on mobile layouts without causing rendering lag.
outcomes: Reduced order processing cycles from 2 days to under 15 minutes, boosting client satisfaction metrics.
